TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Jianshi, title = Jianshi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jianshi} }

S.FORM: Jianshi Nsgan Jianshi o gaga Nsgan Hsinchu, kmpraan kana dxgal o 522.98 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 397.38 km², dxgal pmblxan o 114.53 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 9,456, sapah o 2,825, seejiq tnpusu 8,569 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 91%(Embgala). Embgala ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Jianshi o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 49. 49 o, Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Ｐiling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qalang-Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Ｍami , Ｑuri , Ｐlmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ɟiansħi nsgan ɟiansħi o gaga nsgan ħsinʦħu, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(əmbgala). əmbgala ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ɟiansħi o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, mk*iħiŋ , mkmatuj , *iliŋ , paqij , jutak , kbaqəħ , ʦinbulan , kuxan , agəq , miʦista , mknaħuj , mksu*iŋ , mklapaj , lkuxan , ħbun-ɾaŋaj , mkslaq , qalaŋ-qwajux , ħbun-qɾamaj , pololan , uɾaw , libu , lljuŋ , ulaj , batul , *ami , *uɾi , *lmwan , tajax , ponawaj , smaŋus , tħjakan , smaŋus , ʦinsbu , juluw , gowɾju , ɾaħaw , ʦjoʦuj , ħbun kɾamaj , ħbun-tunan , kin lwan , qolu , qjuws , ħbun-ləsa , mətapaj , m'jutak , mɾmuɾak , spwan , məlukux , mətuij . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Jianshi Nsgan Jianshi o gaga Nsgan Hsinchu, kmpraan kana dxgal o 522.98 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 397.38 km², dxgal pmblxan o 114.53 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 9,456, sapah o 2,825, seejiq tnpusu 8,569 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 91%(Embgala). Embgala ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Jianshi o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 49. 49 o, Mkzihing , Mkmatuy , Ｐiling , Paqiy , Yutak , Kbaqeh , Cinbulan , Kuxan , Ageq , Micista , Mknahuy , Mksuzing , Mklapay , Lkuxan , Hbun-Rangay , Mkslaq , Qalang-Qwayux , Hbun-Qramay , Pololan , Uraw , Libu , Llyung , Ulay , Batul , Ｍami , Ｑuri , Ｐlmwan , Tayax , Ponaway , Smangus , Thyakan , Smangus , Cinsbu , Yuluw , Gowryu , Rahaw , Cyocuy , Hbun kramay , Hbun-tunan , Kin lwan , Qolu , Qyuws , Hbun-lesa , Metapay , M'yutak , Mrmurak , Spwan , Melukux , Metuiy . pusupnyahan patas
